### THE BENEFITS OF BERSOLUX

Bersolux by Fra-Ber is a professional concentrated car shampoo also designed for use by car care enthusiasts.

Main features:

- Neutral cleaner: its neutral formula makes it suitable for use on all types of paint and even matt, metallic or wrap finishes;
- Gentle on surfaces: the product's lubricating properties make it easy to apply, gliding on the bodywork while deep-cleaning;
- Polishing and self-drying effect: the wax allows quick drying during rinsing while at the same time filling the micro-scratches, making the bodywork shine and sparkle;
- Concentrated: the product has a high concentration of active substances and is sold as a concentrate to be diluted before use, with 1 L of product yielding up to 50 L of ready-to-use solution;
- Suitable for all vehicles: it can be used on all types of vehicles including sports cars, utility vehicles, vans, camper vans, trucks and motorbikes.

### BERSOLUX IS IDEAL

- To wash your car with a professional product that can also be used by auto detailing and car care enthusiasts;
- To reduce the risk of micro-scratches during washing thanks to the foam and lubricating properties of the product;
- As a concentrated product that can be diluted as needed to ensure the right strength and intensity based on the toughness of the dirt.

### HOW TO USE BERSOLUX

We recommend using Bersolux as a car shampoo.

Main steps:

- Rinse the vehicle, removing traces of soil that may damage the bodywork;
- Make sure to remove any bracelets or wristwatches to avoid accidentally scratching the bodywork during washing;
- In a bucket, dilute between 20 and 40 ml of Bersolux per litre of water;
- Stir to homogenise the solution before use;
- Use the resulting mixture with a mitt or clean sponge;
- Rinse with plenty of water, from top to bottom.

If applied with a pressure spray pump or bucket: dilute to a ratio between 1:24 and 1:49, i.e., use between 40 ml and 20 ml of product and top up with water (between 960 ml and 980 ml) to obtain a 1 L ready-to-use solution.

Precautions: Do not allow the product to dry and do not apply in the sun and on hot surfaces. The product can be applied on dry bodywork, however, during the summer or in extremely hot regions, it is recommended to rinse the car first to lower its temperature and prevent it from drying during application.

### SAFETY INFO & DATA SHEET

PRODUCT CODE: 700620 - R:14 BERSOLUX 1 L

P102 Keep out of reach of children.
P103 Read carefully and follow all instructions.
P264 Wash hands thoroughly after handling.
P280 Wear protective gloves/protective clothing/eye protection/face protection.
P305+P351+P338 IN CASE OF CONTACT WITH THE EYES: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do. Keep on rinsing.

Contains among other ingredients: Less than 5%: EDTA and salts thereof, Anionic surfactants, Non-ionic surfactants. Perfume. Preservatives (Benzisothiazolinone, Phenoxyethanol).

# Bersolux Professional and Concentrated Car Shampoo-1 L- Fra-Ber

## Description

Professional Cleaning and Smart Polishing in One Step

Fra-Ber's Bersolux is a concentrated professional car shampoo, designed for both car enthusiasts and professionals alike. Its unique, neutral formulation not only cleans deeply but also lubricates the surface, allowing the sponge to glide effortlessly, while providing a self-polishing and drying effect that fills in micro-scratches and delivers a brilliant shine.

Main Features:

- pH-Neutral and Safe Cleaner: Suitable for all paint types, including matte, metallic, and vinyl wraps.
- Gentle and Smooth: Its lubricating properties make application easy, allowing it to glide over the bodywork during deep cleaning.
- Self-Polishing & Drying Effect: Contains wax for quick drying during rinsing.
- Highly Concentrated and Economical: A high-concentration product diluted before use; 1 liter yields up to 50 liters of ready-to-use solution (at a ratio of 20-40 ml per liter of water).
- Universal Use: Can be used on all types of vehicles, from sports cars to trucks and motorcycles.

Professional Usage Instructions:

- Initial Preparation: Rinse the vehicle to remove loose dirt that could scratch the bodywork. Remove any bracelets or watches for added safety.
- Dilution: In a bucket, dilute 20 to 40 ml of Bersolux per liter of water and mix well.
- Washing: Use the resulting solution with a clean wash mitt or sponge.
- Rinsing: Rinse thoroughly with plenty of water, from top to bottom.

Important Note: Do not let the product dry on the car, and do not apply it under direct sunlight or on hot surfaces. It can be applied to a dry body, but in summer or very hot climates, it's preferable to rinse first to cool down the vehicle.

Why Choose Bersolux Shampoo from Fra-Ber?
- Absolute Safety: A neutral, gentle cleaner that protects your investment in your car's paint, regardless of its type.
- Results Beyond Ordinary Washing: Goes beyond cleaning to polish and fill micro-scratches for a deeper shine.
- Highly Economical: High concentration makes it the optimal choice for long-term home and professional use.
- Italian Expertise in Every Wash: European quality and technology for superior car care.

# Fra-Ber Bersolux - ( Car Shampoo )

Product Image: https://www.autopia.ie/wp-content/uploads/2021/02/bersolux-1000-no-gas-900x900-1.png

## Description

SELF-POLISHING SHAMPOO CONCENTRATE.

This product is a chemically neutral detergent, to clean vehicles and hard surfaces in general. The active substances of the product are highly concentrated and it can be used on every kind of paint. It develops a polishing effect and is self drying. The foam is blue coloured.

Directions for use:

Remove surface filth with a water jet. Pour 20-30gr of product into 10L water, and then wash the car as usual with a sponge or glove. It is preferable to perform this operation away from the sunlight.

Warnings:

Handle the product following all the precautionary advices as stated in safety data sheet.

## Additional information

Size: 1L, 5L
